name: Draughts
description: A two-tone checkerboard, the light and dark squares re-dyeing on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); } @match((@x + @y) % 2 == 0) { background: @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
